lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in fair condition.

This vehicle is in museum-quality, mint condition. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, retaining its original factory luster with no chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin smells like new; the upholstery, dashboard, and carpets show zero signs of wear. Mechanically, it performs exactly as it did the day it left the showroom, with a complete service history and all maintenance up to date. This is a rare find for a collector or a discerning buyer looking for perfection.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It has visible cosmetic wear on the interior and exterior. The mechanical components are functional but show signs of use and may require repairs.

Step into a truly exceptional driving experience with this pristine, showroom-quality vehicle! It is in absolute mint condition, meticulously maintained to look and drive exactly like new. From its flawless exterior to the spotless interior, this car is a rare find for a discerning buyer looking for perfection on the road.
The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has some minor dents and scratches, and the interior shows noticeable wear. It is mechanically functional but will likely need routine maintenance soon.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a dependable daily driver for several years. While it remains mechanically sound and road-ready, there are several areas that reflect its age and usage. The exterior shows some minor cosmetic wear, including small paint chips and a few light scratches. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows noticeable wear on the driver's seat. All major systems are functional, though the air conditioning is not as cold as it once was, and the tires will likely need replacement within the next 5,000 miles. It is a reliable option for someone seeking a functional vehicle who is comfortable with some upcoming minor maintenance.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle offers a harmonious blend of refined performance and enduring reliability. Meticulously maintained and subjected to a rigorous professional inspection, it remains in commendable condition, ensuring a sophisticated driving experience for its next proprietor. A premier choice for those who value both aesthetic integrity and mechanical precision.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride and it’s looking for a brand new home! It’s been super reliable for me and is in really solid shape—perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. It runs great and has been well-loved, so you can count on it to get you where you need to go. I'd love for you to come by, take it for a spin, and see for yourself how smoothly it handles! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Used car for sale. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic blend of performance and comfort, presenting in impressive shape both inside and out. The exterior paint retains a high-gloss finish, showing only the lightest signs of careful use consistent with its age, while the body panels remain straight and free of significant blemishes. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and has been kept smoke-free; the upholstery is firm and free of tears, and the dashboard and trim remain in excellent order. Every feature, including the infotainment system, backup camera, and dual-zone climate control, is fully operational. Mechanically, the car is solid, having undergone regular multi-point inspections and timely oil changes. It starts up immediately, idles smoothly, and delivers a composed, quiet ride on the highway. We have kept a detailed log of its service history to ensure peace of mind for the next owner. With a set of high-quality tires and brakes that still have significant life remaining, this car is ready for immediate daily use or long-distance travel. It is a reliable, high-quality choice for anyone seeking a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate acquisition, this unit exemplifies the rigorous quality standards of our curated inventory.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it delivers a driving experience that balances sophistication with proven reliability. Our rigorous inspection process ensures this selection meets our exacting standards for performance and long-term value.

Used car in good condition. Reliable daily driver. Clean title. Minor interior wear.

This 2017 Audi S5 is a prime example of a well-cared-for enthusiast vehicle. The exterior paint retains a brilliant luster, with only negligible blemishes from standard use, while the 19-inch wheels are free of major curb rash. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the Carbon Atlas inlays are pristine, and the climate control and infotainment systems work perfectly. Under the hood, the 3.0T engine delivers smooth, consistent power, supported by a documented maintenance record and a recent multi-point inspection. With a set of high-performance tires recently installed and a smoke-free interior, this S5 offers a perfect balance of performance and daily comfort for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has undergone a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. Offering a balanced synthesis of luxury and utility, it stands as a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking quality and long-term value.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to a rigorous standard, ensuring both mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. It exhibits a well-preserved interior and consistent performance characteristics, representing a premier choice for those seeking quality and value in a pre-owned acquisition.

Hey there! 🚗 I'm looking for a new home for my trusty ride. It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in really solid shape for its next adventure! It runs like a charm and has been well-loved over the years, making it a perfect choice if you're looking for quality without the brand-new price tag. I’d love for someone to enjoy it as much as I have—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offering a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54B32 inline-six with individual throttle bodies and an 8,000 RPM redline. This example has undergone essential preventative maintenance, including a comprehensive double-VANOS service and rod bearing replacement. The chassis is reinforced at the rear subframe mounting points and benefits from refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers for precise turn-in. Power is managed via a 6-speed manual transmission and a factory variable M differential lock. A true driver’s car with linear power delivery and sorted kinematics.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive shape for its mileage. The exterior boasts a deep, glossy finish with only the minor, expected road wear consistent with careful daily use. Inside, the cabin feels like a sanctuary; the leather seats have been regularly conditioned to prevent cracking, and every button and feature—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is rock solid. It has followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule, including recent fluid flushes and a fresh set of high-performance tires installed last season. It drives smooth and quiet, offering the perfect balance of luxury and reliability. Whether you're looking for a dependable commuter or a stylish weekend cruiser, this car is ready for its next chapter with no immediate service needs.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a harmonious blend of performance and sophisticated styling. Each component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for reliability and comfort. We invite you to experience the perfect balance of prestige and value in this superior automotive offering.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for pre-owned inventory. Fully inspected and ready for immediate delivery, this unit exemplifies our commitment to automotive excellence and reliable performance.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a fantastic car to own. It’s in really wonderful shape, runs like a dream, and has clearly been well-loved over the years. Perfect for anyone looking for something reliable and stylish without the brand-new price tag. Come check it out—you won't be disappointed!

Offered is a mechanically robust E92 M3 featuring the legendary S65 naturally aspirated 4.0L V8. This high-revving power plant delivers linear power delivery up to its 8,400 RPM redline, breathing through eight individual throttle bodies. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from the M-Variable Differential Lock and Electronic Damper Control (EDC) for precise lateral dynamics. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive rod bearing inspection and throttle actuator service, ensuring the valvetrain and VANOS system operate within factory tolerances. Good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Maintenance up to date. Priced for quick sale.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of reliability and aesthetic appeal. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish, showing only the lightest signs of careful use, while the body remains straight and free of significant blemishes. Step inside to a clean, non-smoking interior where the upholstery remains firm and the electronics—including the premium sound system and climate control—operate flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts with precision, backed by a comprehensive service history and recent preventative maintenance. Equipped with tires that have plenty of tread remaining, this car is ready for the road and promises a comfortable, worry-free driving experience for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, which exemplifies a superior balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been maintained to a high standard, ensuring a reliable and refined driving experience for the discerning professional. While it possesses the honest character of a seasoned motorcar, its operational performance remains robust and consistent. This offering represents a significant opportunity to secure a high-caliber automobile that meets our stringent criteria for roadworthiness and value.
